description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on a schedule, on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on published releases. The workflow builds and tests a C++ project with a matrix strategy across different operating systems, compilers, SSL configurations, and dependencies. It checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures the project with CMake, builds the project, starts a ClickHouse server in the background, and runs tests.
